title: ferray-numpy-interop: no Arrow RecordBatch interop
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

Arrow's primary data container is RecordBatch (multiple named columns). ferray interop only converts individual PrimitiveArrays. For IPC, Parquet, and Flight data exchange, RecordBatch is the standard unit. Add to_record_batch(arrays: &[(&str, &Array1<T>)]) and from_record_batch(batch) -> Vec<DynArray> conversions.
